title: Contact us
description: How to contact us if you need help.

rows: Within Australia: 13 28 61 and select option 5 From overseas: + 61 2 6216 1111 Details about our business hours are available here .

Go to the myGov site and look for your answer in need help? External Link or Contact the myGov Help Desk: dial 13 23 07 and select option 1 - Monday to Friday 7:00am to 10:00pm - Saturday and Sunday 10:00am to 5:00pm (local time).
